eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Indiana; at 7:12 PM on JAN 3, 2019 Effective until 7:27 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Indiana EAS System. This test is conducted in coordination with the Indiana Broadcasters as a public service to the citizens of Indiana.
